Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 133 

RLTD_NRSNG_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Related Nursing Services Provider Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the nursing service-related category; ever in 
the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: RLTD_NRSNG_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: RLTD_NRSNG_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR
